raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is targeting 2-5 gigawatts (GW) of offshore wind power by 2030 and 25 GW by 2045.",
    "AB 1417 ensures local communities and tribes receive funding and support to participate in California's clean energy future.",
    "The Offshore Wind Community Capacity Building Fund Grant Account will be established by AB 1417.",
    "Offshore wind developers will be mandated to contribute financial assistance to the Offshore Wind Community Capacity Building Fund.",
    "Both public and private funding sources are permitted to make deposits into the Offshore Wind Community Capacity Building Fund.",
    "The California Energy Commission will administer the Offshore Wind Community Capacity Building Fund.",
    "Offshore wind developers will be required to disclose key details regarding their financial contributions to the fund.",
    "The California Energy Commission must publish a publicly accessible report detailing all contributions and allocations to the fund."
  ]
}
```
